notes: 18-bin hybrid global distribution for trendy_nee_median. Bin 1: near-zero (< 5 gC m-2 yr-1). Bins 2–18: 17 equal-area quantile bins. Q_PROBS = (1:16)/17. KG land mask: koppen_geiger_0p5.tif.
